description: Friday model bake-off — fixed prompts across translation / writing / speaking. Used to compare candidate brains on a 16GB Mac.

tests.input: Could you please follow up with the vendor and loop me in once you hear back?
这个项目下周要上线，但还有几个 bug 没修完，我有点担心。
他这个人刀子嘴豆腐心。
The model overfits on the training set, so we added dropout and early stopping.
I very like this movie, it make me feel happy.
tests.look_for: fix grammar, give corrected version + why

tests.input: I am writing to you for asking about the status of my application.
Please kindly find the attached document and revert back to me asap.
tests.look_for: spot redundancy / non-native phrasing (revert back, kindly)

tests.input: Um, I think the, the meeting is, how to say, not very useful for me because I cannot understand what they talk about.
tests.look_for: idiomatic rephrase of a spoken sentence, encouraging tone

tests.input: I very like coffee but today I no drink because I sleep late and wake up late.
tests.look_for: fix learner errors, suggest natural conversational version
